name: Source Trust Calibration
description: Advisory mod that flags calibrating source trust based on provenance, source type, historical noise, data sensitivity, and operation tier.
advises_on: Calibrating source trust based on provenance, source type, historical noise, data sensitivity, and operation tier.
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Suggests a source-trust calibration; advisory input to the operator, never an enforced tier.
